title: (PhireKit) Touchdown PCR Cycling Parameters
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4t3pt","text":"This is the protocol for the PhireKit touchdown PCR assay","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"5u8np","text":"The assay has been optimized and validated for the Bio-rad C1000 Touch Thermocycler.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: 65 o C ( -1 o C per cycle) 5 s

End Adapted from: Don RH, Cox PT, Wainwright BJ, Baker K, Mattick JS. “Touchdown” PCR to circumvent spurious priming during gene amplification. Nucleic Acids Res. 1991;19: 4008. doi:10.1093/nar/19.14.4008
creator: Chen Wang
